name: C1_senior_leadership

facts.who: CXOs and director-level positions, people with more than 15 years of experience
facts.for: CXOs and director-level positions with 15+ years experience
facts.newly created: This is for selection, comparing candidates against a leadership benchmark
facts.selection: Selection, comparing candidates against a leadership benchmark

facts.cognitive: Yes, add a cognitive test for this level

expected: Entry Level Customer Serv - Retail & Contact Center

name: C6_plant_operators
opener: We're hiring plant operators for a chemical facility. Safety is absolute top priority: reliability, procedure compliance, never cutting corners. What do you recommend?

facts.industrial: We're industrial, the 8.0 bundle is the right fit

name: C7_healthcare_bilingual
opener: We're hiring bilingual healthcare admin staff in South Texas; they handle patient records and need to be assessed in Spanish. HIPAA compliance is critical. What assessments work?

facts.pool: They're functionally bilingual, English fluent for written work, go with the hybrid
facts.fits: Functionally bilingual, go with the hybrid

name: C8_admin_office
opener: I need to quickly screen admin assistants for Excel and Word daily.

facts.simulation: I'm OK with adding a simulation, we want to capture the capabilities
facts.capabilit: Yes, add a simulation to capture capabilities

name: C9_fullstack_jd
opener: Here's the JD for an engineer we need to fill: Senior Full-Stack Engineer, 5+ years across Core Java, Spring, REST API design, Angular, SQL relational databases, AWS deployment and Docker. Owns end-to-end microservice delivery, contributes to architecture, mentors mid-level engineers. Strong CI/CD and cloud-native experience required.

facts.backend: Backend-leaning. Day-one priorities are Core Java and Spring; SQL is constant; Angular is occasional review-only
facts.frontend: Backend-leaning, Angular is occasional review only
facts.senior ic: Senior IC. They lead design on their own services but don't manage other engineers
facts.tech lead: Senior IC, not a tech lead

name: C10_grad_trainee
opener: We run a graduate management trainee scheme. We need a full battery: cognitive, personality, and situational judgement. All recent graduates.

facts.shorter: Drop the OPQ. Final list: Verify G+ and Graduate Scenarios
facts.replace: Drop the OPQ, keep Verify G+ and Graduate Scenarios
